description: Install or update auto-bmad config and help entries. Collects project preferences and writes config.yaml.
Run the full BMAD planning pipeline — PRD through epics and stories — for the project.
Assess project complexity and write quick/full mode recommendations per epic to sprint-status.yaml. Run on existing projects without a planning assessment.
Run the TEA test design pipeline before starting an epic. Generates epic-level test architecture.
Run all stories in epic N through the full 11-step pipeline. Requires TEA.
outputs: story files atdd traceability token-reports sprint-status.yaml

description: Run all stories in epic N through the quick 3-step pipeline. No TEA required.
Run a single story through the full 11-step pipeline. Requires TEA.
Run a single story through the quick 3-step pipeline. No TEA required.
Run E2E test generation + epic retrospective after all stories are done.
Run a spec-only change pipeline — updates story spec and AC without touching implementation.
Run a dev-only change pipeline — updates implementation to match a spec that has already changed.
Run all GDS stories in epic N through the full 11-step pipeline. Requires GDS + TEA.
outputs: story files atdd traceability token-reports sprint-status.yaml

description: Run all GDS stories in epic N through the quick 3-step pipeline.
Run a single GDS story through the full 11-step pipeline. Requires GDS + TEA.
Run a single GDS story through the quick 3-step pipeline.
